BombVault's Healthchecks.io integration now tracks the whole backup lifecycle, so a Healthchecks check reflects your backups accurately even with failure-only notifications.

## Added

- **Healthchecks start ping** — when a backup begins, BombVault now pings the Healthchecks `/start` endpoint (in addition to the success / `/fail` ping when it finishes). That lets Healthchecks measure how long a backup takes and flag one that started but never finished (a hung or crashed run), not just one that reported a failure. (#27, thanks @ptmorris1)

## Changed

- **Healthchecks now pings the full lifecycle independent of the "notify on" policy.** Previously, with notifications set to *failure only*, a successful backup sent no Healthchecks ping at all — so the check went red on success from "no ping received", the opposite of what you want. Healthchecks is a monitor rather than a human message, so it now always receives start / success / failure pings whenever a URL is set (the *notify on* policy still governs the webhook, Matrix and email channels). Set your notifications to failure-only and your Healthchecks check will still go green on every successful backup and only red on a real failure or a missed run.

---
